Bumping this email from earlier, because Mitch McConnell could force this disgusting bill to a vote in just 72 hours.
Senators Elizabeth Warren, Claire McCaskill, Tammy Baldwin, and Kirsten Gillibrand are doing everything they can to stop it, but they can't do it alone.
[**Will you please put your name down to say that you stand with Democratic women in the fight to block the GOP's dangerous health care plan and stop Trumpcare in its tracks?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee2/2a380d31/18332bfb/fea8f1/1519983989/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170626_women-health-care?source=e20170626_womenhealth2_act-ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
We're running out of time and we're hanging on to access to affordable health care by the skin on our teeth, so please add your name now.
-- Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
Hello,
Mitch McConnell is expected to bring his disastrous version of Trumpcare to a vote later this week with little or no input from experts or constituents, and no hearings.
He's ramming it through because he doesn't want you to have time to look at it. Why? Because it hurts hard-working families like yours the most.
Democratic women in the Senate have been a steadfast firewall against Trumpcare. They're speaking out on the Senate floor, holding emergency field hearings, and demanding answers and accountability from their Republican colleagues.
**They 're fighting for you, everyone, and they need to know that you have their backs. [Add your name to tell Senators Tammy Baldwin, Elizabeth Warren, Claire McCaskill, and Kirsten Gillibrand that you're with them in the fight to protect access to affordable health care.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee2/2a380d31/18332bfb/fea8f2/1519983989/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170626_women-health-care?source=e20170626_womenhealth_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
These women are Moms, legal experts, and people with pre-existing conditions.
They're the strongest advocates we have for Medicaid, maternity coverage, and protections for older Americans. They believe that we shouldn't undermine coverage for people with pre-existing conditions and that we all deserve access to the care we need to get and stay healthy.
They can't win this fight alone, everyone. [**Put your name down to stand with the women in the Senate who won 't stop fighting against Washington Republicans' dangerous, cruel health care bill.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee2/2a380d31/18332bfb/fea8f2/1519983989/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170626_women-health-care?source=e20170626_womenhealth_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for speaking up -- your support is so incredibly important.
-- Team Maggie

subject: EMILY's List resistance supporter record for Peter
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a89/24c69fd9/d6866662/18e70894/3754984968/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE636N_digital_email_20170626_EOQSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE636N_digital_email_20170626_EOQSupporterRecord_inact")

Peter,

Since Election Day, we've seen a record number of new donors, been contacted by nearly 15,000 women who want to run for office, and launched a brand-new program to support them.

The grassroots movement we are building is strong. Now we have to prove we're in it for the long haul.

It takes a significant amount of resources to continue training the women who want to run and to support our women up for re-election next year. That's why hitting our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal is so important.

I've checked our records since Election Day and so many people have stepped up to help. Now I'm asking everyone to do a little more.

Here are our records associated with this exact email address:
**EMILY's List Resistance Donor Status:** Not yet
**[Suggested action: Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a89/24c69fd9/d6866662/18e70895/3754984968/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170626_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Suggested+action+Donate+if+consinConsGro&utm_campaign=WQEFE636N_digital_email_20170626_EOQSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE636N_digital_email_20170626_EOQSupporterRecord_inact")**
I want us to be able to support as many women as possible in key races this year and next year, but doing that means hitting our goals.

Thanks to the outpouring of enthusiasm from this community, we've been able to help more women than ever before.

From training thousands of women to run for office to flipping Republican-held House seats to protecting our nine Senate women up for re-election next year, this community has a lot of races it can impact.

**Donate $3 now to help elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot and reach our End-of-Quarter goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a89/24c69fd9/d6866662/18e70896/3754984968/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170626_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE636N_digital_email_20170626_EOQSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE636N_digital_email_20170626_EOQSupporterRecord_inact")**

Leigh K. Warren

name: Katie McGinty
subject: The next step for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend: I ran for Senate last year because I believed in a future that was fairer, more equal and filled with greater opportunity for all.

Although things didn’t go the way we wanted in November, we can still shape that better, more hopeful future by continuing to fight for the values we believe in. That’s why it’s so important that we fight to reelect every single Democratic senator in 2018 – starting with my good friend Senator Sheldon Whitehouse.

I’m so proud of the work he’s done in the Senate, from acting on climate change to fighting back against Trumpcare. He’s a strong progressive voice and a critical member of our Democratic firewall against Trump’s most dangerous policies.

When I needed him most last cycle, Sheldon had my back – so now, we need to have his. He’s facing a critical end-of-quarter deadline on Friday and is still falling $8,345 short of his goal. Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now?

Click here to give $5 or more right now to protect our Democratic firewall and keep Sheldon Whitehouse fighting for our values in the Senate!
https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/whitehouse_email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=mcginty

I can honestly say that Sheldon is a great friend and an even better senator – so it’s truly an honor to help him meet his goal before this huge FEC deadline. I know how much it’ll mean to him to have this team in his corner.

Thank you,

Katie

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-7485505772130926592/3790933573641437184.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Jason Kander
subject: Before Friday's deadline:
body:
The GOP thinks they've found a foolproof way to win elections **Pitch in $3 or more before our end-of-quarter deadline to help elect Democrats all across the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052337b/4067b0a/35f0caaef/7e68805b/2583719121/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170627_jk_nd1&source=em_20170627_jk_nd1&refcode=em_20170627_jk_nd1")****
The GOP thinks they've found a foolproof way to win elections, Derek: make it harder for people who typically vote for Democrats to cast their ballots.

You don't have to take my word for it -- you can ask the courts.

Last year, a federal court struck down North Carolina's draconian voting restrictions because they targeted African Americans "with almost surgical precision." The Supreme Court just announced that it will take up a case of gerrymandered congressional districts in Wisconsin, which one federal court already found were designed specifically to hurt minority voters.

But even though the GOP is starting to take some losses in court, we know they're going to keep passing restrictive voting laws and drawing gerrymandered maps. It's a lot easier to win when you've got your finger on the scale -- even if it comes at the cost of eroding the very fabric of our democracy.

These voting restrictions and district maps come by and large from GOP-controlled statehouses. So if we're going to stop this junk, we need to elect Democratic governors and state legislators.

There are governor's mansions and legislative seats at stake in just a few months in Virginia and New Jersey. Friday's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is a huge opportunity for Democrats to set the tone for victories in November.

So if you believe in protecting our right to vote and making sure our elections are fair, I need you to commit to electing Democrats. Chip in $3 or whatever you can before this deadline.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052337b/4067b0a/35f0caaef/7e688058/2583719121/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170627_jk_nd1&source=em_20170627_jk_nd1&refcode=em_20170627_jk_nd1")

clean_body: The GOP thinks they've found a foolproof way to win elections Pitch in $3 or more before our end-of-quarter deadline to help elect Democrats all across the country. ""** The GOP thinks they've found a foolproof way to win elections, Derek: make it harder for people who typically vote for Democrats to cast their ballots. You don't have to take my word for it -- you can ask the courts. Last year, a federal court struck down North Carolina's draconian voting restrictions because they targeted African Americans "with almost surgical precision." The Supreme Court just announced that it will take up a case of gerrymandered congressional districts in Wisconsin, which one federal court already found were designed specifically to hurt minority voters. But even though the GOP is starting to take some losses in court, we know they're going to keep passing restrictive voting laws and drawing gerrymandered maps. It's a lot easier to win when you've got your finger on the scale -- even if it comes at the cost of eroding the very fabric of our democracy. These voting restrictions and district maps come by and large from GOP-controlled statehouses. So if we're going to stop this junk, we need to elect Democratic governors and state legislators. There are governor's mansions and legislative seats at stake in just a few months in Virginia and New Jersey. Friday's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is a huge opportunity for Democrats to set the tone for victories in November. So if you believe in protecting our right to vote and making sure our elections are fair, I need you to commit to electing Democrats. Chip in $3 or whatever you can before this deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" ** Thanks for stepping up when it counts. Jason | ---|--- Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The American people are calling out for relief, and President Donald J. Trump and his Administration are determined to provide it – by working with Congress to rescue Americans from this catastrophe.

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: what's coming next on health care
body:
We still have work to do in order to save affordable care.
---
**We won a victory on health care today, but we've got to keep our foot on the gas. Pitch in $10 or more before our end-of-quarter deadline so we're ready for what's coming next.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523371/4067b0a/35e4d561a/7e6b57bc/2164678373/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170627_tp2_s3&source=em_20170627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20170627_tp2_s3")****
Derek --

Mitch McConnell just announced he'll delay voting on the Senate Republican health care repeal bill. That's a huge victory, but our work isn't over because Republicans are still determined to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

Our calls, emails, petition signatures, ads, and rallies are working. Republicans are giving in to public pressure -- for now -- but I guarantee they'll be back after the July 4th recess with another attempt to take our health care away.

So we can't let up. We can't take our foot off the gas, not even for one second. We have to keep putting pressure on Senate Republicans to vote NO until health care repeal is gone once and for all. We need to keep those calls, emails, petition signatures, ads, and rallies going just as strong.

We need you to stay in this fight with us, Derek. Chip in $10 or whatever you can before our end-of-quarter deadline on Friday. Help make sure we're ready for what's coming next.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

Now, access to affordable health care is back on the line, and once again, President Obama is counting on all of us to step up and make a difference.

name: LegitPAC Team
subject: The attacks on Warren & Brown
body:
Dark money attack groups don't care if their attacks are legitimate, but we can bolster our democracy.
Dark money attack groups don't care if their attacks are legitimate, but we can bolster our democracy. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e7/1c469400/399fdfd/354be0b/3795511769/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_warrenbrown?refcode=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg&source=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg") Friend, Their elections may be almost a year and a half away, but dark money attack groups are already targeting even more of our champions in the Senate. One super PAC just started running ads attacking **Senator Elizabeth Warren** in Massachusetts, and the groups that spent $64 million trying to defeat **Senator Sherrod Brown** in Ohio last time have announced they're planning to surpass that figure this time. If Warren and Brown file financial disclosures showing high levels of grassroots support, they can make a strong claim to voters that they're the legitimate options in the race. But the end-of-quarter disclosure deadline is coming up in just a few days. [**_Contribute $3 to Senators Elizabeth Warren and Sherrod Brown now, before the end-of-quarter financial deadline on Friday._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e7/1c469400/399fdfd/354be07/3795511769/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_warrenbrown?refcode=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+3+to+Senators+Elizabeth+Warre&utm_campaign=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg&source=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg") **Elizabeth Warren** has become a prominent figure in the fight against corruption and dark money. She's been a vocal supporter of the Fair Elections Now Act, DISCLOSE Act, and Shareholder Protection Act, and she's been a leader on investigating conflicts of interest with the Trump transition and taxpayer money. **Sherrod Brown** is not only a strong progressive, but has been a leader in the fight for campaign finance reform and voter protection. He introduced the Foreclosure Fraud and Homeowner Abuse Prevention Act to hold too-big-to-fail banks accountable, and he co-sponsored the DISCLOSE Act to tighten protections against illegal campaign contributions. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the billionaires that back them on Wall Street and elsewhere will do anything to defeat these two champions. They don't care if it's legitimate or not. The next elections will be some of the most important for our democratic legitimacy in decades. With only four days until the reporting deadline at the end of the quarter, we can make the biggest early impact on these elections by stepping up now. [**_Step up now. Contribute $3 to Senators Elizabeth Warren and Sherrod Brown now, before the end-of-quarter financial deadline on Friday._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e7/1c469400/399fdfd/354be02/3795511769/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_warrenbrown?refcode=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Step+up+now+Contribute+3+to+Senators+Eli&utm_campaign=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg&source=20170627_Senate_Slate_msg") These dark money attack groups don't care if their attacks delegitimize our elections. name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Call your senator. Stop the health care repeal.
body:
We're running out of time to defeat this cruel and heartless bill
#
Friends,
The Congressional Budget Office released their score of the Senate's health care bill, and it found that this version would have nearly the same catastrophic effect as the House bill--22 million additional Americans would lose coverage--putting the total number of uninsured Americans to 50 million. It's an insult to the American people.
That's why we have to oppose this bill with everything we've got.
**[Please call your senator and tell them to stop this health care repeal before Republican leadership rams it through this week.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dde/43f17890/c8d1fff3/62035f6b/3187853826/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170627-full") We only have a few days to stop this disastrous bill.**
Cutting 22 million people off of health insurance, slashing Medicaid, and raising costs for everyday Americans to give tax breaks to the wealthy is the worst thing that could happen to the American health care system. **[Tell your senator to stop the Republicans' health care repeal and protect the 22 million people who would lose coverage if it passes.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dde/43f17890/c8d1fff3/62035f6b/3187853826/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170627-full")**
We're running out of time to defeat this cruel and heartless bill. Join us and take action today.
In solidarity,

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 22 million
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2ed3/738133e4/2cb7c531/7f85d37a/294880649/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Dear friend,
* "We're going to have insurance for everybody." ([January 15, 2017](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2ed3/738133e4/2cb7c531/7f85d37b/294880649/VEsE/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/trump-vows-insurance-for-everybody-in-obamacare-replacement-plan/2017/01/15/5f2b1e18-db5d-11e6-ad42-f3375f271c9c_story.html?utm_term=.b6b3f80377c5"))
* "I'm not going to cut Social Security like every other Republican, and I'm not going to cut Medicare or Medicaid." ([May 21, 2015](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2ed3/738133e4/2cb7c531/7f85d374/294880649/VEsF/ "http://dailysignal.com/2015/05/21/why-donald-trump-wont-touch-your-entitlements/"))
* "I want to keep pre-existing conditions. I think we need it." ([February 25, 2016](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2ed3/738133e4/2cb7c531/7f85d375/294880649/VEsC/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/the-fix/wp/2016/02/25/the-cnntelemundo-republican-debate-transcript-annotated/?utm_term=.d3f8f8dd556b"))
* "You are going to end up with great health care for a fraction of the price." ([February 8, 2016](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2ed3/738133e4/2cb7c531/7f85d376/294880649/VEsD/ "https://thinkprogress.org/trump-puts-off-promise-to-immediately-fix-obamacare-e4da3e50fd60"))

These are all claims that Donald Trump made about healthcare before he was sworn in as president. Now that the most recent version of the bill has been scored by the CBO, we know his plan will cover **22 million fewer people.** And for those that _are_ covered, they can expect higher premiums and shoddier benefits.

In fact, it's not a health care plan at all. It's a tax cut for those at the top at the expense of those who need it most. And it will lead to devastating consequences for many of the working-class Americans Trump claims to speak for.

Donald Trump won the presidency largely on the pretense of being a "political outsider" and "great negotiator." Yet when it comes to the nitty-gritty of setting policy, hard-right extremists in the House and Senate are setting the agenda. I'm not even sure Trump knows what's in his own bill. **As long as it counts as a political win, he and the GOP majority are willing to let millions upon millions suffer.**

While Obamacare wasn't perfect, it was a significant step forward for so many Americans who, for decades, faced lifetime caps and the constant threat of losing coverage. The focus should be on working together to get it right, not scoring political points.

**Any progress is now slowly eroding each day this president is in office.**
* "Trump confirms he called health care bill 'mean.'" ([June 26, 2017](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2ed3/738133e4/2cb7c531/7f85d377/294880649/VEsA/ "http://www.cnn.com/2017/06/25/politics/donald-trump-confirms-mean-health-care/index.html"))

Well.. that's one promise we know he has kept.

\-- Patrick

body:
It’s the greatest privilege of my life to serve as your Vice President alongside a President who is fighting every day to Make America Great Again.
**Join our fight to Make America Great Again – sign now to support our mission.**
[ **Add your name** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/b0f39c4dc82a446fa7642735cacbc2b5?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=676d0083d9ef46cf9ca9301701e3d3e8&utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_medium=132971&utm_term=join-team&utm_content=petition)
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/73978110f8e64ea09535ff4e64739eaa?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=676d0083d9ef46cf9ca9301701e3d3e8&utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_medium=132971&utm_term=join-team&utm_content=petition) |
---|---|---
Lynne,
**It’s the greatest privilege of my life** to serve as your Vice President alongside a President who is fighting every day to Make America Great Again.
_Since Day One of this administration, President Trump and I have been working tirelessly to keep the promises we made to the American People._ **Unemployment is at a ten-year low and continues to fall.** Our laws are being enforced. Our veterans are finally beginning to receive the care they so desperately deserve. Our military is being rebuilt. And our credibility on the world stage has been restored, because America is once again standing tall.

We have put America \-- _and the forgotten men and women of our country_ \-- first.
This success is great, but we’re just getting started...
Each day, I see even more promise in our fight to Make America Great Again.
**But the President and I can’t do it alone.**
The only way to fully unleash this American potential is to lift up and support candidates and leaders who share our vision for the future. Who believe in the promise of a better tomorrow. And who will stand with us in this fight to change the direction in Washington.
**[Are you willing to do your part to Make America Great Again? Sign now to help support the candidates who fight alongside the President and me.](http://links.iterable.com/u/c4503a2ee6114d0597988d14c4dafb02?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=676d0083d9ef46cf9ca9301701e3d3e8&utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_medium=132971&utm_term=join-team&utm_content=petition)**
That’s why I wanted you to be one of the first to know that **I have launched Great America Committee to support candidates who will help President Trump and me Make America Great Again.**
Just last week, we saw the resounding power of our movement with a great victory by Karen Handel in Georgia. With your help, we can elect more fighters like Karen all across this country.
**[But we can’t win this fight alone. I need your support right now. Sign your name today to support leadership that will Make America Great Again.](http://links.iterable.com/u/0c24edd9ce2246f3b8f742e74c9183fd?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=676d0083d9ef46cf9ca9301701e3d3e8&utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_medium=132971&utm_term=join-team&utm_content=petition)**
As always, I remain deeply humbled by and grateful for the honor you have given me to serve.
God Bless,
Vice President Mike Pence
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/c0c3e818ac474229949abd0d1dbcfebb?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=676d0083d9ef46cf9ca9301701e3d3e8&utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_medium=132971&utm_term=join-team&utm_content=petition)
**[P.S. The President and I need you alongside us in this fight -- can we count on you?](http://links.iterable.com/u/121c20c1cec8413bb8c6c68fa6b5c32b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=676d0083d9ef46cf9ca9301701e3d3e8&utm_source=iterable&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_medium=132971&utm_term=join-team&utm_content=petition)**

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: Senate health care vote suspended
body:
We've bought ourselves some time to stop this bill for good.
#
Friends,
Thank you. Because of you and the thousands of calls made that flooded the offices of Senators Susan Collins, Dean Heller, and others, Mitch McConnell just announced that the Senate will delay their vote on the disastrous American Health Care Act until after the July recess.
We've bought ourselves some time to stop this bill for good. Now Republican senators have to go home to explain why they're trying to rip health care away from 22 million. **[We must remain vigilant and protect health care for millions of Americans. Please donate any amount to Our Revolution to help fuel our efforts to stop this terrible health care bill.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dc1/43f17890/c953cad0/62035f36/797584401/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em170627-full")**
The tide is turning in our favor but there's no telling how abruptly the GOP will turn around and try to force a vote on health care. It's clear that our model of organizing is working. Our Revolution and other grassroots organizations are taking back power from Republican legislators through direct actions, phone calls, and the electoral power we're building across the country.
[**Lives are on the line in the debate over our health care. Make a contribution of any amount today to help us organize for Medicare for All.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dc1/43f17890/c953cad0/62035f36/797584401/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em170627-full")
This is a great victory. The political revolution is winning, and that's all thanks to your efforts and support. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution

Peter,

Six months in, Joe's shown that when it's right for Hoosiers, he'll push back against the Trump Administration. He'll fight against a plan to cut $9.2 billion in education funding, a bill that would strip 22 million Americans of their health care, and efforts to create huge new tax breaks for corporations and the wealthy.

Because Joe has tried to hold Trump accountable for his agenda, President Trump, the Koch brothers, and their allies in Congress would like nothing better than to replace him with a yes man for their extreme ideas, and they're already spending big to make it happen. **To fight back, we 've set a fundraising goal of $30,000 to hit by June 30, our end-of-quarter deadline.**

**[Will you pitch in $5 to ensure we keep Joe in the Senate to fight for Hoosiers and stand up to the Trump Agenda?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26f1/7377f838/36ae5f4a/51fb17cc/540159420/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170627nd&amount=10")**

President Trump has made it clear that his administration has one goal: To take from the poor and middle class, and give to the rich. On everything from plans to gut Medicaid, to decimating public education, to slashing tax rates for the very wealthiest, he's put wealthy Republican elites before Hoosier families. **Peter, Donald Trump doesn 't like it when people stand up to him -- and that's exactly what Joe is doing by putting Hoosiers first.**

We can't allow the president and his special interest allies to replace Joe with a rubber stamp. **That 's why this end-of quarter deadline is our most important yet. [Can you chip in $5 to make sure Indiana keeps Joe in the Senate, fighting back against Trump's extreme agenda?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26f1/7377f838/36ae5f4a/51fb17cc/540159420/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170627nd&amount=10")**

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: I have faith in you
body:
#
Team --
Some political consultants say this time period is called the "summer slump" \-- that this is the time when people start to feel a little worn out and they struggle to see the light at the end of the tunnel, and that fundraising numbers dwindle because of that.
I told them that they clearly haven't met our team.
You know that we have to keep going, that this isn't a sprint; it's a marathon. You know that we can do this, but only if we all keep working together, even if we get tired. You all have shown me time and time again that you are willing to put in the effort and the energy necessary to sustain this campaign.
I have faith in each and every one of you, and I know that together, we will come through once again and show Florida what a true people-powered campaign looks like.
[**Our fundraising reporting deadline is this Friday at 11:59 PM. Help us prove that we have the excitement and enthusiasm necessary to win this campaign by chipping in now:**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3316/9e00690/4d39ffa2/2403644a/3994553191/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?refcode=em20170627")
